SEARCH

Package io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.widgets.type

package io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.widgets.type
Enumerations that classify CMS sidebar widgets by their generation mode (automatic, custom, or default) and by their content type, used to select the correct rendering template.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.widgets
    Model for CMS sidebar widgets, covering custom HTML widgets, facet-field widgets, page-list widgets, RSS feed widgets, and the display element wrapper used when rendering the sidebar.
    io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.widgets.embed
    JPA entities that embed sidebar widget instances into CMS pages and templates, with specialised subclasses for automatic, custom, and default widget placement.
  • Class
    Description
    AutomaticWidgetType
    All types of sidebar widgets which are generated automatically if certain conditions are met, usually if certain CMS content exists Currently (22-01) only CMS-Geomaps provide automatic widgets.
    CustomWidgetType
    Types of sidebar widgets that contain individual configuration and must be created by a user.
    DefaultWidgetType
    Types of widgets that are always available for CMS pages and cannot be configured.
    WidgetContentType
    Common interface for all CMS sidebar-widget content types (DefaultWidgetType, AutomaticWidgetType, CustomWidgetType), providing metadata such as label, icon, filename, and page-level display constraints.
    WidgetGenerationType
    Indicates how data for a sidebar widget is created and stored.
